name: relayify-plugin
description: Tools for generating front-end code in Relay Financial's design language. Hosts the relayify Claude Code plugin (skill + MCP server + curated registry + style guide).

plugins.name: relayify
plugins.description: Write front-end code (React/TSX or plain HTML) in Relay Financial's design language. Bundles 48 component specs, design tokens, a curated style guide, and an MCP server. The consumer skill auto-activates on Relay project work.
